name: Black-Eyed Peas & Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad up to Step 3 in advance and store it in the refrigerator.
2. Allow the salad to come to room temperature before serving.
3. Whisk together the mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar until fully dissolved.
4. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while continuing to whisk.
5. Toss the black-eyed peas and rice with the vinaigrette until everything is evenly coated.
6. Mix in the onion, garlic, carrot, and chives or parsley.
7. Serve garnished with radicchio leaves and a leaf of Boston lettuce.
